# main
## model
```{r}
library(msm)
library(arrow)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 1. 读取数据
# =========================
df_states <- read_parquet("File/Part Data/part2-main.parquet")
# 查看结构
str(df_states)
head(df_states)
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 2. 数据整理
# =========================
df_states <- df_states %>%
  arrange(`身份证号`, time) %>%
  mutate(
    state = as.integer(state),
    time_years = as.numeric(time_years),
    payment = as.factor(payment),
    gender = as.factor(gender)
  )

# 支付方式
df_states$payment <- relevel(df_states$payment, ref = "SP")
# 年龄
df_states$age10 <- df_states$age / 10
# 性别
df_states$gender <- factor(df_states$gender, levels = c(0, 1))
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 3. 检查相邻观测的状态转移
# =========================
df_check <- df_states %>%
  arrange(`身份证号`, time) %>%
  group_by(`身份证号`) %>%
  mutate(next_state = lead(state)) %>%
  ungroup()

trans_table <- df_check %>%
  filter(!is.na(next_state)) %>%
  count(state, next_state) %>%
  arrange(state, next_state)

trans_table
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 4. 定义初始 Q 矩阵
# =========================
Q_init <- rbind(
  c(0, 0.10, 0.10, 0.05, 0),
  c(0, 0,    0,    0,    0.10),
  c(0, 0,    0,    0,    0.10),
  c(0, 0,    0,    0,    0.10),
  c(0, 0,    0,    0,    0)
)

rownames(Q_init) <- colnames(Q_init) <- c("State1", "State2", "State3", "State4", "State5")
Q_init
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 5. 基础模型
# =========================
msm_base <- msm(
  state ~ time_years,
  subject = `身份证号`,
  data = df_states,
  qmatrix = Q_init,
  gen.inits = FALSE,
  control = list(fnscale = 4000, maxit = 1000, trace = 1)
)

msm_base
```

```{r}
msm_pay <- msm(
  state ~ time_years,
  subject = `身份证号`,
  data = df_states,
  qmatrix = Q_init,
  covariates = ~ payment,
  gen.inits = FALSE,
  control = list(fnscale = 4000, maxit = 2000, trace = 1, reltol = 1e-10)
)
```

```{r}
msm_pay <- msm(
  state ~ time_years,
  subject = `身份证号`,
  data = df_states,
  qmatrix = Q_init2,
  covariates = ~ payment,
  gen.inits = FALSE,
  control = list(fnscale = 4000, maxit = 2000, trace = 1, reltol = 1e-10)
)

msm_pay
```

```{r}
msm_full <- msm(
  state ~ time_years,
  subject = `身份证号`,
  data = df_states,
  qmatrix = Q_init,
  covariates = ~ payment + age10 + gender,
  gen.inits = FALSE,
  control = list(fnscale = 4000, maxit = 3000, trace = 1, reltol = 1e-10)
)

msm_full
```
```{r}
saveRDS(msm_full, 
        'E:/vscode/Paper/Health  Inequalities in Hypertension/Revision1/File/Result/Part2/Model/main_allicds.RDS')

msm_full <- readRDS('E:/vscode/Paper/Health  Inequalities in Hypertension/Revision1/File/Result/Part2/Model/main_allicds.RDS')
```

## pmatrix
```{r}
# =========================
# 0-6年各状态转移概率（msm_full）
# 固定 age 和 gender，仅比较不同 payment
# =========================

time_points <- seq(0, 6, by = 0.05)
payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

# 这里建议明确指定一个代表性年龄和性别
ref_age <- mean(df_states$age, na.rm = TRUE) / 10
ref_gender <- levels(df_states$gender)[1]   # 例如 "0.0" 或 "1.0"

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "/n")
  
  for (t in time_points) {
    p_result <- pmatrix.msm(
      msm_full,
      t = t,
      covariates = list(
        payment = pay_type,
        age10 = ref_age,
        gender = ref_gender
      ),
      ci = "normal",
      B = 200
    )
    
    est <- p_result$estimates
    low <- p_result$L
    upp <- p_result$U
    
    res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
      t = t,
      type = pay_type,
      age = ref_age,
      gender = ref_gender,
      
      r12  = est[1, 2],
      r12l = low[1, 2],
      r12u = upp[1, 2],
      
      r13  = est[1, 3],
      r13l = low[1, 3],
      r13u = upp[1, 3],
      
      r14  = est[1, 4],
      r14l = low[1, 4],
      r14u = upp[1, 4],
      
      r25  = est[2, 5],
      r25l = low[2, 5],
      r25u = upp[2, 5],
      
      r35  = est[3, 5],
      r35l = low[3, 5],
      r35u = upp[3, 5],
      
      r45  = est[4, 5],
      r45l = low[4, 5],
      r45u = upp[4, 5]
    )
    
    k <- k + 1
  }
}

cumulative_risk_table <- do.call(rbind, res_list)
cumulative_risk_table
```
```{r}
write_parquet(
  cumulative_risk_table,
  "File/Result/Part2/main/pmatrix.parquet"
)
```



## ppass
```{r}
# =========================
# msm_full: 用 ppass.msm() 计算累计到达概率（带CI）
# =========================

library(msm)
library(dplyr)
library(arrow)

time_points <- seq(0, 6, by = 0.1)
payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

# 固定协变量
ref_age <- mean(df_states$age, na.rm = TRUE) / 10
ref_gender <- levels(df_states$gender)[1]

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "/n")
  
  for (t in time_points) {
    p_result <- ppass.msm(
      msm_full,
      tot = t,
      covariates = list(
        payment = pay_type,
        age10 = ref_age,
        gender = ref_gender
      ),
      ci = "normal",
      B = 200
    )
    
    est <- p_result$estimates
    low <- p_result$L
    upp <- p_result$U
    
    res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
      t = t,
      type = pay_type,
      age10 = ref_age,
      gender = ref_gender,
      
      # 从 state1 出发，到时间 t 为止已访问过某状态的概率
      p12  = est[1, 2],
      p12l = low[1, 2],
      p12u = upp[1, 2],
      
      p13  = est[1, 3],
      p13l = low[1, 3],
      p13u = upp[1, 3],
      
      p14  = est[1, 4],
      p14l = low[1, 4],
      p14u = upp[1, 4],
      
      p15  = est[1, 5],
      p15l = low[1, 5],
      p15u = upp[1, 5],
      
      # 从 state2/3/4 出发，到时间 t 为止已访问过 state5 的概率
      p25  = est[2, 5],
      p25l = low[2, 5],
      p25u = upp[2, 5],
      
      p35  = est[3, 5],
      p35l = low[3, 5],
      p35u = upp[3, 5],
      
      p45  = est[4, 5],
      p45l = low[4, 5],
      p45u = upp[4, 5]
    )
    
    k <- k + 1
  }
}

cumulative_pass_table <- bind_rows(res_list)

head(cumulative_pass_table)
```

```{r}
# 导出
arrow::write_parquet(
  cumulative_pass_table,
  "File/Result/Part2/Main/ppass_allicds.parquet"
)
```

## efpt
```{r}
ref_age <- mean(df_states$age, na.rm = TRUE) / 10
ref_gender <- levels(df_states$gender)[1]
payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "/n")
  
  efpt_result <- efpt.msm(
    msm_full,
    tostate = 5,
    covariates = list(
      payment = pay_type,
      age10 = ref_age,
      gender = ref_gender
    ),
    ci = "normal"
  )
  
  # efpt_result 是矩阵：
  # 第1行 est，第2行 2.5%，第3行 97.5%
  res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
    type = pay_type,
    age10 = ref_age,
    gender = ref_gender,
    
    efpt_1_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 1],
    efpt_1_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 1],
    efpt_1_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 1],
    
    efpt_2_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 2],
    efpt_2_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 2],
    efpt_2_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 2],
    
    efpt_3_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 3],
    efpt_3_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 3],
    efpt_3_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 3],
    
    efpt_4_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 4],
    efpt_4_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 4],
    efpt_4_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 4],
    
    efpt_5_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 5],
    efpt_5_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 5],
    efpt_5_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 5]
  )
  
  k <- k + 1
}
```


```{r}
write_parquet(
  efpt_table,
  "File/Result/Part2/Main/efpt_to5.parquet"
)
```

## totlos
### time-dependent
```{r}
time_points <- seq(0, 6, by = 0.1)
payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

# 固定协变量
ref_age10 <- mean(df_states$age, na.rm = TRUE) / 10
ref_gender <- levels(df_states$gender)[1]

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "\n")
  
  for (tt in time_points) {
    los_result <- totlos.msm(
      msm_full,
      t = tt,
      covariates = list(
        payment = pay_type,
        age10 = ref_age10,
        gender = ref_gender
      ),
      ci = "normal"
    )
    
    # 你的版本返回矩阵：
    # 第1行 = est
    # 第2行 = 2.5%
    # 第3行 = 97.5%
    res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
      t = tt,
      type = pay_type,
      age10 = ref_age10,
      gender = ref_gender,
      
      los_state1  = los_result[1, 1],
      los_state1l = los_result[2, 1],
      los_state1u = los_result[3, 1],
      
      los_state2  = los_result[1, 2],
      los_state2l = los_result[2, 2],
      los_state2u = los_result[3, 2],
      
      los_state3  = los_result[1, 3],
      los_state3l = los_result[2, 3],
      los_state3u = los_result[3, 3],
      
      los_state4  = los_result[1, 4],
      los_state4l = los_result[2, 4],
      los_state4u = los_result[3, 4],
      
      los_state5  = los_result[1, 5],
      los_state5l = los_result[2, 5],
      los_state5u = los_result[3, 5]
    )
    
    k <- k + 1
  }
}

los_timecourse_table <- bind_rows(res_list)

head(los_timecourse_table)
```

```{r}
write_parquet(
  los_timecourse_table,
  "File/Result/Part2/Main/totlos_timedependent.parquet"
)
```

### 6years
```{r}
# 固定协变量：年龄和性别
ref_age <- mean(df_states$age, na.rm = TRUE) / 10
ref_gender <- levels(df_states$gender)[1]
payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "\n")
  
  # 计算到第 5 年时，不同状态的期望逗留时间
  los_result <- totlos.msm(
    msm_full, 
    t = 6, 
    covariates = list(
      payment = pay_type
      # ,age10 = ref_age
      # ,gender = ref_gender
    ),
    ci = "normal",
    B = 200
  )
  
  # los_result 是一个原子向量，包含了状态 1 到状态 5 的期望逗留时间
  res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
    type = pay_type,
    # age10 = ref_age,
    # gender = ref_gender,
    t = 6,
    
    # 使用索引直接访问各状态的期望逗留时间
    los_state1  = los_result[1],
    los_state1l = los_result[2],
    los_state1u = los_result[3],
    
    los_state2  = los_result[4],
    los_state2l = los_result[5],
    los_state2u = los_result[6],
    
    los_state3  = los_result[7],
    los_state3l = los_result[8],
    los_state3u = los_result[9],
    
    los_state4  = los_result[10],
    los_state4l = los_result[11],
    los_state4u = los_result[12],
    
    los_state5  = los_result[13],
    los_state5l = los_result[14],
    los_state5u = los_result[15]
  )
  
  k <- k + 1
}

# 汇总所有医保类型的结果
los_table_6y <- bind_rows(res_list)
```

```{r}
# 保存结果为 Parquet 文件
write_parquet(
  los_table_6y,
  "File/Result/Part2/Main/totlos_6y.parquet"
)
```




# Sensitivity - primary icds
## model
```{r}
library(msm)
library(arrow)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 1. 读取数据
# =========================
df_states <- read_parquet("File/Part Data/part2-sensitivity-primaryicds.parquet")
# 查看结构
str(df_states)
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 2. 数据整理
# =========================
df_states <- df_states %>%
  arrange(`身份证号`, time) %>%
  mutate(
    state = as.integer(state),
    time_years = as.numeric(time_years),
    payment = as.factor(payment),
    gender = as.factor(gender)
  )

# 支付方式
df_states$payment <- relevel(df_states$payment, ref = "SP")
# 年龄
df_states$age10 <- df_states$age / 10
# 性别
df_states$gender <- factor(df_states$gender, levels = c(0, 1))
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 3. 检查相邻观测的状态转移
# =========================
df_check <- df_states %>%
  arrange(`身份证号`, time) %>%
  group_by(`身份证号`) %>%
  mutate(next_state = lead(state)) %>%
  ungroup()

trans_table <- df_check %>%
  filter(!is.na(next_state)) %>%
  count(state, next_state) %>%
  arrange(state, next_state)

trans_table
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 4. 定义初始 Q 矩阵
# =========================
Q_init <- rbind(
  c(0, 0.10, 0.10, 0.05, 0),
  c(0, 0,    0,    0,    0.10),
  c(0, 0,    0,    0,    0.10),
  c(0, 0,    0,    0,    0.10),
  c(0, 0,    0,    0,    0)
)

rownames(Q_init) <- colnames(Q_init) <- c("State1", "State2", "State3", "State4", "State5")
Q_init
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 5. 基础模型
# =========================
msm_base <- msm(
  state ~ time_years,
  subject = `身份证号`,
  data = df_states,
  qmatrix = Q_init,
  gen.inits = FALSE,
  control = list(fnscale = 4000, maxit = 1000, trace = 1)
)

msm_base
```

```{r}
msm_pay <- msm(
  state ~ time_years,
  subject = `身份证号`,
  data = df_states,
  qmatrix = Q_init,
  covariates = ~ payment,
  gen.inits = FALSE,
  control = list(fnscale = 4000, maxit = 2000, trace = 1, reltol = 1e-10)
)
```

```{r}
msm_pay <- msm(
  state ~ time_years,
  subject = `身份证号`,
  data = df_states,
  qmatrix = Q_init2,
  covariates = ~ payment,
  gen.inits = FALSE,
  control = list(fnscale = 4000, maxit = 2000, trace = 1, reltol = 1e-10)
)

msm_pay
```

```{r}
msm_full <- msm(
  state ~ time_years,
  subject = `身份证号`,
  data = df_states,
  qmatrix = Q_init,
  covariates = ~ payment + age10 + gender,
  gen.inits = FALSE,
  control = list(fnscale = 4000, maxit = 3000, trace = 1, reltol = 1e-10)
)

msm_full
```

```{r}
saveRDS(msm_full, 
        'E:/vscode/Paper/Health  Inequalities in Hypertension/Revision1/File/Result/Part2/Model/sensitivity_primaryicds.RDS')

msm_full <- readRDS('E:/vscode/Paper/Health  Inequalities in Hypertension/Revision1/File/Result/Part2/Model/sensitivity_primaryicds.RDS')
```

## pmatrix
```{r}
# =========================
# 0-6年各状态转移概率（msm_full）
# 固定 age 和 gender，仅比较不同 payment
# =========================

time_points <- seq(0, 6, by = 0.05)
payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

# 这里建议明确指定一个代表性年龄和性别
ref_age <- mean(df_states$age, na.rm = TRUE) / 10
ref_gender <- levels(df_states$gender)[1]   # 例如 "0.0" 或 "1.0"

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "/n")
  
  for (t in time_points) {
    p_result <- pmatrix.msm(
      msm_full,
      t = t,
      covariates = list(
        payment = pay_type,
        age10 = ref_age,
        gender = ref_gender
      ),
      ci = "normal",
      B = 200
    )
    
    est <- p_result$estimates
    low <- p_result$L
    upp <- p_result$U
    
    res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
      t = t,
      type = pay_type,
      age = ref_age,
      gender = ref_gender,
      
      r12  = est[1, 2],
      r12l = low[1, 2],
      r12u = upp[1, 2],
      
      r13  = est[1, 3],
      r13l = low[1, 3],
      r13u = upp[1, 3],
      
      r14  = est[1, 4],
      r14l = low[1, 4],
      r14u = upp[1, 4],
      
      r25  = est[2, 5],
      r25l = low[2, 5],
      r25u = upp[2, 5],
      
      r35  = est[3, 5],
      r35l = low[3, 5],
      r35u = upp[3, 5],
      
      r45  = est[4, 5],
      r45l = low[4, 5],
      r45u = upp[4, 5]
    )
    
    k <- k + 1
  }
}

cumulative_risk_full <- do.call(rbind, res_list)

head(cumulative_risk_full)
```


```{r}
# 导出
arrow::write_parquet(
  cumulative_risk_full,
  "File/Result/Part2/Sensitivity-primaryicds/pmatrix.parquet"
)
```

## ppass
```{r}
# =========================
# msm_full: 用 ppass.msm() 计算累计到达概率（带CI）
# =========================

library(msm)
library(dplyr)
library(arrow)

time_points <- seq(0, 6, by = 0.1)
payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

# 固定协变量
ref_age <- mean(df_states$age, na.rm = TRUE) / 10
ref_gender <- levels(df_states$gender)[1]

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "/n")
  
  for (t in time_points) {
    p_result <- ppass.msm(
      msm_full,
      tot = t,
      covariates = list(
        payment = pay_type,
        age10 = ref_age,
        gender = ref_gender
      ),
      ci = "normal",
      B = 200
    )
    
    est <- p_result$estimates
    low <- p_result$L
    upp <- p_result$U
    
    res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
      t = t,
      type = pay_type,
      age10 = ref_age,
      gender = ref_gender,
      
      # 从 state1 出发，到时间 t 为止已访问过某状态的概率
      p12  = est[1, 2],
      p12l = low[1, 2],
      p12u = upp[1, 2],
      
      p13  = est[1, 3],
      p13l = low[1, 3],
      p13u = upp[1, 3],
      
      p14  = est[1, 4],
      p14l = low[1, 4],
      p14u = upp[1, 4],
      
      p15  = est[1, 5],
      p15l = low[1, 5],
      p15u = upp[1, 5],
      
      # 从 state2/3/4 出发，到时间 t 为止已访问过 state5 的概率
      p25  = est[2, 5],
      p25l = low[2, 5],
      p25u = upp[2, 5],
      
      p35  = est[3, 5],
      p35l = low[3, 5],
      p35u = upp[3, 5],
      
      p45  = est[4, 5],
      p45l = low[4, 5],
      p45u = upp[4, 5]
    )
    
    k <- k + 1
  }
}

cumulative_pass_table <- bind_rows(res_list)

head(cumulative_pass_table)
```

```{r}
# 导出
arrow::write_parquet(
  cumulative_pass_table,
  "File/Result/Part2/Sensitivity-primaryicds/ppass.parquet"
)
```

## efpt
```{r}
msm_full <- readRDS("E:/vscode/Paper/Health  Inequalities in Hypertension/Revision1/File/Result/Part2/Model/sensitivity_primaryicds.RDS")
```

```{r}
ref_age <- mean(df_states$age, na.rm = TRUE) / 10
ref_gender <- levels(df_states$gender)[1]
payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "/n")
  
  efpt_result <- efpt.msm(
    msm_full,
    tostate = 5,
    covariates = list(
      payment = pay_type,
      age10 = ref_age,
      gender = ref_gender
    ),
    ci = "normal"
  )
  
  # efpt_result 是矩阵：
  # 第1行 est，第2行 2.5%，第3行 97.5%
  res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
    type = pay_type,
    age10 = ref_age,
    gender = ref_gender,
    
    efpt_1_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 1],
    efpt_1_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 1],
    efpt_1_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 1],
    
    efpt_2_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 2],
    efpt_2_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 2],
    efpt_2_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 2],
    
    efpt_3_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 3],
    efpt_3_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 3],
    efpt_3_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 3],
    
    efpt_4_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 4],
    efpt_4_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 4],
    efpt_4_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 4],
    
    efpt_5_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 5],
    efpt_5_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 5],
    efpt_5_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 5]
  )
  
  k <- k + 1
}

efpt_table <- bind_rows(res_list)
```


```{r}
write_parquet(
  efpt_table,
  "File/Result/Part2/Sensitivity-primaryicds/efpt_to5.parquet"
)
```

## totlos
### time-dependent
```{r}
time_points <- seq(0, 6, by = 0.1)
payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

# 固定协变量
ref_age10 <- mean(df_states$age, na.rm = TRUE) / 10
ref_gender <- levels(df_states$gender)[1]

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "\n")
  
  for (tt in time_points) {
    los_result <- totlos.msm(
      msm_full,
      t = tt,
      covariates = list(
        payment = pay_type,
        age10 = ref_age10,
        gender = ref_gender
      ),
      ci = "normal"
    )
    
    # 你的版本返回矩阵：
    # 第1行 = est
    # 第2行 = 2.5%
    # 第3行 = 97.5%
    res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
      t = tt,
      type = pay_type,
      age10 = ref_age10,
      gender = ref_gender,
      
      los_state1  = los_result[1, 1],
      los_state1l = los_result[2, 1],
      los_state1u = los_result[3, 1],
      
      los_state2  = los_result[1, 2],
      los_state2l = los_result[2, 2],
      los_state2u = los_result[3, 2],
      
      los_state3  = los_result[1, 3],
      los_state3l = los_result[2, 3],
      los_state3u = los_result[3, 3],
      
      los_state4  = los_result[1, 4],
      los_state4l = los_result[2, 4],
      los_state4u = los_result[3, 4],
      
      los_state5  = los_result[1, 5],
      los_state5l = los_result[2, 5],
      los_state5u = los_result[3, 5]
    )
    
    k <- k + 1
  }
}

los_timecourse_table <- bind_rows(res_list)

head(los_timecourse_table)
```

```{r}
write_parquet(
  los_timecourse_table,
  "File/Result/Part2/sensitivity-primaryicds/totlos_timedependent.parquet"
)
```

### 6years
```{r}
# 固定协变量：年龄和性别
ref_age <- mean(df_states$age, na.rm = TRUE) / 10
ref_gender <- levels(df_states$gender)[1]
payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "\n")
  
  # 计算到第 5 年时，不同状态的期望逗留时间
  los_result <- totlos.msm(
    msm_full, 
    t = 6, 
    covariates = list(
      payment = pay_type
      # ,age10 = ref_age
      # ,gender = ref_gender
    ),
    ci = "normal",
    B = 200
  )
  
  # los_result 是一个原子向量，包含了状态 1 到状态 5 的期望逗留时间
  res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
    type = pay_type,
    # age10 = ref_age,
    # gender = ref_gender,
    t = 6,
    
    # 使用索引直接访问各状态的期望逗留时间
    los_state1  = los_result[1],
    los_state1l = los_result[2],
    los_state1u = los_result[3],
    
    los_state2  = los_result[4],
    los_state2l = los_result[5],
    los_state2u = los_result[6],
    
    los_state3  = los_result[7],
    los_state3l = los_result[8],
    los_state3u = los_result[9],
    
    los_state4  = los_result[10],
    los_state4l = los_result[11],
    los_state4u = los_result[12],
    
    los_state5  = los_result[13],
    los_state5l = los_result[14],
    los_state5u = los_result[15]
  )
  
  k <- k + 1
}

# 汇总所有医保类型的结果
los_table_6y <- bind_rows(res_list)
```


```{r}
# 保存结果为 Parquet 文件
write_parquet(
  los_table_6y,
  "File/Result/Part2/Sensitivity-primaryicds/totlos_6y.parquet"
)
```

# Sensitivity - anystate
## main
```{r}
library(msm)
library(arrow)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 1. 读取数据
# =========================
df_states <- read_parquet("File/Part Data/part2-sensitivity-anystate.parquet")
# 查看结构
str(df_states)
head(df_states)
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 2. 数据整理
# =========================
df_states <- df_states %>%
  arrange(`身份证号`, time) %>%
  mutate(
    state = as.integer(state),
    time_years = as.numeric(time_years),
    payment = as.factor(payment),
    gender = as.factor(gender)
  )

# 支付方式
df_states$payment <- relevel(df_states$payment, ref = "SP")
# 年龄
df_states$age10 <- df_states$age / 10
# 性别
df_states$gender <- factor(df_states$gender, levels = c(0, 1))
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 3. 检查相邻观测的状态转移
# =========================
df_check <- df_states %>%
  arrange(`身份证号`, time) %>%
  group_by(`身份证号`) %>%
  mutate(next_state = lead(state)) %>%
  ungroup()

trans_table <- df_check %>%
  filter(!is.na(next_state)) %>%
  count(state, next_state) %>%
  arrange(state, next_state)

trans_table
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 4. 定义初始 Q 矩阵
# =========================
Q_init <- rbind(
  c(0, 0.10, 0.10, 0.05, 0),
  c(0, 0,    0,    0,    0.10),
  c(0, 0,    0,    0,    0.10),
  c(0, 0,    0,    0,    0.10),
  c(0, 0,    0,    0,    0)
)

rownames(Q_init) <- colnames(Q_init) <- c("State1", "State2", "State3", "State4", "State5")
Q_init
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 5. 基础模型
# =========================
msm_base <- msm(
  state ~ time_years,
  subject = `身份证号`,
  data = df_states,
  qmatrix = Q_init,
  gen.inits = FALSE,
  control = list(fnscale = 4000, maxit = 1000, trace = 1)
)

msm_base
```

```{r}
msm_pay <- msm(
  state ~ time_years,
  subject = `身份证号`,
  data = df_states,
  qmatrix = Q_init,
  covariates = ~ payment,
  gen.inits = FALSE,
  control = list(fnscale = 4000, maxit = 2000, trace = 1, reltol = 1e-10)
)
```

```{r}
msm_pay <- msm(
  state ~ time_years,
  subject = `身份证号`,
  data = df_states,
  qmatrix = Q_init2,
  covariates = ~ payment,
  gen.inits = FALSE,
  control = list(fnscale = 4000, maxit = 2000, trace = 1, reltol = 1e-10)
)

msm_pay
```

```{r}
msm_full <- msm(
  state ~ time_years,
  subject = `身份证号`,
  data = df_states,
  qmatrix = Q_init,
  covariates = ~ payment + age10 + gender,
  gen.inits = FALSE,
  control = list(fnscale = 4000, maxit = 3000, trace = 1, reltol = 1e-10)
)

msm_full
```

```{r}
saveRDS(msm_full, 
        'E:/vscode/Paper/Health  Inequalities in Hypertension/Revision1/File/Result/Part2/Model/sensitivity_anystate.RDS')

msm_full <- readRDS('E:/vscode/Paper/Health  Inequalities in Hypertension/Revision1/File/Result/Part2/Model/sensitivity_anystate.RDS')
```

## pmatrix
```{r}
# =========================
# 0-6年各状态转移概率（msm_full）
# 固定 age 和 gender，仅比较不同 payment
# =========================

time_points <- seq(0, 6, by = 0.05)
payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

# 这里建议明确指定一个代表性年龄和性别
ref_age <- mean(df_states$age, na.rm = TRUE) / 10
ref_gender <- levels(df_states$gender)[1]   # 例如 "0.0" 或 "1.0"

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "/n")
  
  for (t in time_points) {
    p_result <- pmatrix.msm(
      msm_full,
      t = t,
      covariates = list(
        payment = pay_type,
        age10 = ref_age,
        gender = ref_gender
      ),
      ci = "normal",
      B = 200
    )
    
    est <- p_result$estimates
    low <- p_result$L
    upp <- p_result$U
    
    res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
      t = t,
      type = pay_type,
      age = ref_age,
      gender = ref_gender,
      
      r12  = est[1, 2],
      r12l = low[1, 2],
      r12u = upp[1, 2],
      
      r13  = est[1, 3],
      r13l = low[1, 3],
      r13u = upp[1, 3],
      
      r14  = est[1, 4],
      r14l = low[1, 4],
      r14u = upp[1, 4],
      
      r25  = est[2, 5],
      r25l = low[2, 5],
      r25u = upp[2, 5],
      
      r35  = est[3, 5],
      r35l = low[3, 5],
      r35u = upp[3, 5],
      
      r45  = est[4, 5],
      r45l = low[4, 5],
      r45u = upp[4, 5]
    )
    
    k <- k + 1
  }
}

cumulative_risk_full <- do.call(rbind, res_list)

head(cumulative_risk_full)
```


```{r}
# 导出
arrow::write_parquet(
  cumulative_risk_full,
  "File/Result/Part2/Sensitivity-anystate/pmatrix.parquet"
)
```

## ppass
```{r}
# =========================
# msm_full: 用 ppass.msm() 计算累计到达概率（带CI）
# =========================

library(msm)
library(dplyr)
library(arrow)

time_points <- seq(0, 6, by = 0.1)
payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

# 固定协变量
ref_age <- mean(df_states$age, na.rm = TRUE) / 10
ref_gender <- levels(df_states$gender)[1]

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "/n")
  
  for (t in time_points) {
    p_result <- ppass.msm(
      msm_full,
      tot = t,
      covariates = list(
        payment = pay_type,
        age10 = ref_age,
        gender = ref_gender
      ),
      ci = "normal",
      B = 200
    )
    
    est <- p_result$estimates
    low <- p_result$L
    upp <- p_result$U
    
    res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
      t = t,
      type = pay_type,
      age10 = ref_age,
      gender = ref_gender,
      
      # 从 state1 出发，到时间 t 为止已访问过某状态的概率
      p12  = est[1, 2],
      p12l = low[1, 2],
      p12u = upp[1, 2],
      
      p13  = est[1, 3],
      p13l = low[1, 3],
      p13u = upp[1, 3],
      
      p14  = est[1, 4],
      p14l = low[1, 4],
      p14u = upp[1, 4],
      
      p15  = est[1, 5],
      p15l = low[1, 5],
      p15u = upp[1, 5],
      
      # 从 state2/3/4 出发，到时间 t 为止已访问过 state5 的概率
      p25  = est[2, 5],
      p25l = low[2, 5],
      p25u = upp[2, 5],
      
      p35  = est[3, 5],
      p35l = low[3, 5],
      p35u = upp[3, 5],
      
      p45  = est[4, 5],
      p45l = low[4, 5],
      p45u = upp[4, 5]
    )
    
    k <- k + 1
  }
}

cumulative_pass_table <- bind_rows(res_list)

head(cumulative_pass_table)
```

```{r}
# 导出
arrow::write_parquet(
  cumulative_pass_table,
  "File/Result/Part2/Sensitivity-anystate/ppass.parquet"
)
```

## efpt
```{r}
msm_full <- readRDS("E:/vscode/Paper/Health  Inequalities in Hypertension/Revision1/File/Result/Part2/Model/sensitivity_anystate.RDS")
```

```{r}
ref_age <- mean(df_states$age, na.rm = TRUE) / 10
# ref_gender <- levels(df_states$gender)[1]
# payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "/n")
  
  efpt_result <- efpt.msm(
    msm_full,
    tostate = 5,
    covariates = list(
      payment = pay_type
      # ,age10 = ref_age
      # ,gender = ref_gender
    ),
    ci = "normal"
  )
  
  # efpt_result 是矩阵：
  # 第1行 est，第2行 2.5%，第3行 97.5%
  res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
    type = pay_type,
    age10 = ref_age,
    gender = ref_gender,
    
    efpt_1_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 1],
    efpt_1_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 1],
    efpt_1_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 1],
    
    efpt_2_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 2],
    efpt_2_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 2],
    efpt_2_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 2],
    
    efpt_3_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 3],
    efpt_3_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 3],
    efpt_3_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 3],
    
    efpt_4_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 4],
    efpt_4_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 4],
    efpt_4_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 4],
    
    efpt_5_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 5],
    efpt_5_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 5],
    efpt_5_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 5]
  )
  
  k <- k + 1
}

efpt_table <- bind_rows(res_list)
```

```{r}
write_parquet(
  efpt_table,
  "File/Result/Part2/Sensitivity-anystate/efpt_to5.parquet"
)
```

## totlos
### time-dependent
```{r}
time_points <- seq(0, 6, by = 0.1)
payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

# 固定协变量
ref_age10 <- mean(df_states$age, na.rm = TRUE) / 10
ref_gender <- levels(df_states$gender)[1]

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "\n")
  
  for (tt in time_points) {
    los_result <- totlos.msm(
      msm_full,
      t = tt,
      covariates = list(
        payment = pay_type
      ),
      ci = "normal"
    )
    
    # 你的版本返回矩阵：
    # 第1行 = est
    # 第2行 = 2.5%
    # 第3行 = 97.5%
    res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
      t = tt,
      type = pay_type,
      age10 = ref_age10,
      gender = ref_gender,
      
      los_state1  = los_result[1, 1],
      los_state1l = los_result[2, 1],
      los_state1u = los_result[3, 1],
      
      los_state2  = los_result[1, 2],
      los_state2l = los_result[2, 2],
      los_state2u = los_result[3, 2],
      
      los_state3  = los_result[1, 3],
      los_state3l = los_result[2, 3],
      los_state3u = los_result[3, 3],
      
      los_state4  = los_result[1, 4],
      los_state4l = los_result[2, 4],
      los_state4u = los_result[3, 4],
      
      los_state5  = los_result[1, 5],
      los_state5l = los_result[2, 5],
      los_state5u = los_result[3, 5]
    )
    
    k <- k + 1
  }
}

los_timecourse_table <- bind_rows(res_list)

head(los_timecourse_table)
```

```{r}
write_parquet(
  los_timecourse_table,
  "File/Result/Part2/sensitivity-anystate/totlos_timedependent.parquet"
)
```
### 6years
```{r}
# 固定协变量：年龄和性别
ref_age <- mean(df_states$age, na.rm = TRUE) / 10
# ref_gender <- levels(df_states$gender)[1]
# payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "\n")
  
  # 计算到第 5 年时，不同状态的期望逗留时间
  los_result <- totlos.msm(
    msm_full, 
    t = 5, 
    covariates = list(
      payment = pay_type
      # ,age10 = ref_age
      # ,gender = ref_gender
    ),
    ci = "normal",
    B = 200
  )
  
  # los_result 是一个原子向量，包含了状态 1 到状态 5 的期望逗留时间
  res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
    type = pay_type,
    # age10 = ref_age,
    # gender = ref_gender,
    t = 6,
    
    # 使用索引直接访问各状态的期望逗留时间
    los_state1  = los_result[1],
    los_state1l = los_result[2],
    los_state1u = los_result[3],
    
    los_state2  = los_result[4],
    los_state2l = los_result[5],
    los_state2u = los_result[6],
    
    los_state3  = los_result[7],
    los_state3l = los_result[8],
    los_state3u = los_result[9],
    
    los_state4  = los_result[10],
    los_state4l = los_result[11],
    los_state4u = los_result[12],
    
    los_state5  = los_result[13],
    los_state5l = los_result[14],
    los_state5u = los_result[15]
  )
  
  k <- k + 1
}

# 汇总所有医保类型的结果
los_table_6y <- bind_rows(res_list)
```


```{r}
# 保存结果为 Parquet 文件
write_parquet(
  los_table_6y,
  "File/Result/Part2/Sensitivity-anystate/totlos_6y.parquet"
)
```
# External Validation
## main
```{r}
library(msm)
library(arrow)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 1. 读取数据
# =========================
df_states <- read_parquet("File/Part Data/part2-external-validation.parquet")
# 查看结构
str(df_states)
head(df_states)
```
```{r}
# gs = df_states[df_states$payment == "GS",]
# coi = df_states[df_states$payment == "COI",]
# df_states <- df_states %>% anti_join(gs, by = "身份证号")
# df_states <- df_states %>% anti_join(coi, by = "身份证号")
```


```{r}
table(df_states$payment)
# =========================
# 2. 数据整理
# =========================
df_states <- df_states %>%
  arrange(`身份证号`, time) %>%
  mutate(
    state = as.integer(state),
    time_years = as.numeric(time_years),
    payment = as.factor(payment),
    gender = as.factor(gender)
  )

# 支付方式
# df_states$payment <- relevel(df_states$payment, ref = "SP")
# df_states$payment <- factor(df_states$payment, levels = c("SP", "UEBMI", "URRBMI", "COI"))
df_states$payment <- factor(df_states$payment, levels = c("SP", "UEBMI", "URRBMI"))
# 年龄
df_states$age10 <- df_states$age / 10
# 性别
df_states$gender <- factor(df_states$gender, levels = c(0, 1))
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 4. 定义初始 Q 矩阵
# =========================
Q_init <- rbind(
  c(0, 0.10, 0.10, 0.05, 0),
  c(0, 0,    0,    0,    0.10),
  c(0, 0,    0,    0,    0.10),
  c(0, 0,    0,    0,    0.10),
  c(0, 0,    0,    0,    0)
)

rownames(Q_init) <- colnames(Q_init) <- c("State1", "State2", "State3", "State4", "State5")
Q_init
```


```{r}
# =========================
# 5. 基础模型
# =========================
msm_base <- msm(
  state ~ time_years,
  subject = `身份证号`,
  data = df_states,
  qmatrix = Q_init,
  gen.inits = FALSE,
  control = list(fnscale = 4000, maxit = 1000, trace = 1)
)

msm_base
```


```{r}
df_states2 <- df_states %>%
  mutate(
    payment = factor(payment)
  )
msm_pay_12_13 <- msm(
  state ~ time_years,
  subject = `身份证号`,
  data = df_states,
  qmatrix = Q_init,
  covariates = list(
    "1-2" = ~ payment,
    "1-3" = ~ payment,
    "2-5" = ~ payment
  ),
  gen.inits = FALSE,
  control = list(
    fnscale = 4000,
    maxit   = 2000,
    trace   = 1,
    reltol  = 1e-10
  )
)
```

```{r}
saveRDS(msm_pay_12_13, 
        'E:/vscode/Paper/Health  Inequalities in Hypertension/Revision1/File/Result/Part2/Model/external_validation.RDS')

msm_full <- readRDS('E:/vscode/Paper/Health  Inequalities in Hypertension/Revision1/File/Result/Part2/Model/external_validation.RDS')
```

## pmatrix
```{r}
# =========================
# 0-6年各状态转移概率（msm_full）
# 固定 age 和 gender，仅比较不同 payment
# =========================

time_points <- seq(0, 6, by = 0.05)
payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "/n")
  
  for (t in time_points) {
    p_result <- pmatrix.msm(
      msm_full,
      t = t,
      covariates = list(
        payment = pay_type
      ),
      ci = "normal",
      B = 200
    )
    
    est <- p_result$estimates
    low <- p_result$L
    upp <- p_result$U
    
    res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
      t = t,
      type = pay_type,
      age = ref_age,
      gender = ref_gender,
      
      r12  = est[1, 2],
      r12l = low[1, 2],
      r12u = upp[1, 2],
      
      r13  = est[1, 3],
      r13l = low[1, 3],
      r13u = upp[1, 3],
      
      r14  = est[1, 4],
      r14l = low[1, 4],
      r14u = upp[1, 4],
      
      r25  = est[2, 5],
      r25l = low[2, 5],
      r25u = upp[2, 5],
      
      r35  = est[3, 5],
      r35l = low[3, 5],
      r35u = upp[3, 5],
      
      r45  = est[4, 5],
      r45l = low[4, 5],
      r45u = upp[4, 5]
    )
    
    k <- k + 1
  }
}

cumulative_risk_full <- do.call(rbind, res_list)

head(cumulative_risk_full)
```


```{r}
# 导出
arrow::write_parquet(
  cumulative_risk_full,
  "File/Result/Part2/External-validation/pmatrix.parquet"
)
```

## ppass
```{r}
# =========================
# msm_full: 用 ppass.msm() 计算累计到达概率（带CI）
# =========================

library(msm)
library(dplyr)
library(arrow)

time_points <- seq(0, 6, by = 0.1)
payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "/n")
  
  for (t in time_points) {
    p_result <- ppass.msm(
      msm_full,
      tot = t,
      covariates = list(
        payment = pay_type
      ),
      ci = "normal",
      B = 200
    )
    
    est <- p_result$estimates
    low <- p_result$L
    upp <- p_result$U
    
    res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
      t = t,
      type = pay_type,
      age10 = ref_age,
      gender = ref_gender,
      
      # 从 state1 出发，到时间 t 为止已访问过某状态的概率
      p12  = est[1, 2],
      p12l = low[1, 2],
      p12u = upp[1, 2],
      
      p13  = est[1, 3],
      p13l = low[1, 3],
      p13u = upp[1, 3],
      
      p14  = est[1, 4],
      p14l = low[1, 4],
      p14u = upp[1, 4],
      
      p15  = est[1, 5],
      p15l = low[1, 5],
      p15u = upp[1, 5],
      
      # 从 state2/3/4 出发，到时间 t 为止已访问过 state5 的概率
      p25  = est[2, 5],
      p25l = low[2, 5],
      p25u = upp[2, 5],
      
      p35  = est[3, 5],
      p35l = low[3, 5],
      p35u = upp[3, 5],
      
      p45  = est[4, 5],
      p45l = low[4, 5],
      p45u = upp[4, 5]
    )
    
    k <- k + 1
  }
}

cumulative_pass_table <- bind_rows(res_list)

head(cumulative_pass_table)
```

```{r}
# 导出
arrow::write_parquet(
  cumulative_pass_table,
  "File/Result/Part2/External-validation/ppass.parquet"
)
```

## efpt
```{r}
msm_full <- readRDS("E:/vscode/Paper/Health  Inequalities in Hypertension/Revision1/File/Result/Part2/Model/sensitivity_anystate.RDS")
```

```{r}
ref_age <- mean(df_states$age, na.rm = TRUE) / 10
# ref_gender <- levels(df_states$gender)[1]
# payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "/n")
  
  efpt_result <- efpt.msm(
    msm_full,
    tostate = 5,
    covariates = list(
      payment = pay_type
      # ,age10 = ref_age
      # ,gender = ref_gender
    ),
    ci = "normal"
  )
  
  # efpt_result 是矩阵：
  # 第1行 est，第2行 2.5%，第3行 97.5%
  res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
    type = pay_type,
    age10 = ref_age,
    gender = ref_gender,
    
    efpt_1_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 1],
    efpt_1_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 1],
    efpt_1_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 1],
    
    efpt_2_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 2],
    efpt_2_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 2],
    efpt_2_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 2],
    
    efpt_3_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 3],
    efpt_3_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 3],
    efpt_3_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 3],
    
    efpt_4_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 4],
    efpt_4_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 4],
    efpt_4_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 4],
    
    efpt_5_to_5  = efpt_result[1, 5],
    efpt_5_to_5l = efpt_result[2, 5],
    efpt_5_to_5u = efpt_result[3, 5]
  )
  
  k <- k + 1
}

efpt_table <- bind_rows(res_list)
```

```{r}
write_parquet(
  efpt_table,
  "File/Result/Part2/Sensitivity-anystate/efpt_to5.parquet"
)
```

## totlos
### time-dependent
```{r}
time_points <- seq(0, 6, by = 0.1)
payment_types <- levels(df_states$payment)

res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "\n")
  
  for (tt in time_points) {
    los_result <- totlos.msm(
      msm_full,
      t = tt,
      covariates = list(
        payment = pay_type
      ),
      ci = "normal"
    )
    
    # 你的版本返回矩阵：
    # 第1行 = est
    # 第2行 = 2.5%
    # 第3行 = 97.5%
    res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
      t = tt,
      type = pay_type,
      
      los_state1  = los_result[1, 1],
      los_state1l = los_result[2, 1],
      los_state1u = los_result[3, 1],
      
      los_state2  = los_result[1, 2],
      los_state2l = los_result[2, 2],
      los_state2u = los_result[3, 2],
      
      los_state3  = los_result[1, 3],
      los_state3l = los_result[2, 3],
      los_state3u = los_result[3, 3],
      
      los_state4  = los_result[1, 4],
      los_state4l = los_result[2, 4],
      los_state4u = los_result[3, 4],
      
      los_state5  = los_result[1, 5],
      los_state5l = los_result[2, 5],
      los_state5u = los_result[3, 5]
    )
    
    k <- k + 1
  }
}

los_timecourse_table <- bind_rows(res_list)

head(los_timecourse_table)
```

```{r}
write_parquet(
  los_timecourse_table,
  "File/Result/Part2/External-validation/totlos_timedependent.parquet"
)
```
### 6years
```{r}
res_list <- list()
k <- 1

for (pay_type in payment_types) {
  cat("处理支付方式:", pay_type, "\n")
  
  # 计算到第 5 年时，不同状态的期望逗留时间
  los_result <- totlos.msm(
    msm_full, 
    t = 5, 
    covariates = list(
      payment = pay_type
    ),
    ci = "normal",
    B = 200
  )
  
  # los_result 是一个原子向量，包含了状态 1 到状态 5 的期望逗留时间
  res_list[[k]] <- data.frame(
    type = pay_type,
    # age10 = ref_age,
    # gender = ref_gender,
    t = 6,
    
    # 使用索引直接访问各状态的期望逗留时间
    los_state1  = los_result[1],
    los_state1l = los_result[2],
    los_state1u = los_result[3],
    
    los_state2  = los_result[4],
    los_state2l = los_result[5],
    los_state2u = los_result[6],
    
    los_state3  = los_result[7],
    los_state3l = los_result[8],
    los_state3u = los_result[9],
    
    los_state4  = los_result[10],
    los_state4l = los_result[11],
    los_state4u = los_result[12],
    
    los_state5  = los_result[13],
    los_state5l = los_result[14],
    los_state5u = los_result[15]
  )
  
  k <- k + 1
}

# 汇总所有医保类型的结果
los_table_6y <- bind_rows(res_list)
```


```{r}
# 保存结果为 Parquet 文件
write_parquet(
  los_table_6y,
  "File/Result/Part2/External-validation/totlos_6y.parquet"
)
```
